description: Global status vocabulary for STEP1-style validation and enforcement.

statuses.summary: Currently in effect or open for work.
Cannot proceed until an external blocker is resolved.
Work reached the intended solution outcome.
Work ended without a satisfactory resolution.
Terminal state for active work items.
Requires follow-up review before reuse or acceptance.
Identified as a possible reusable or accepted artifact.
Approved as the current accepted artifact state.
Retained only for historical or low-frequency lookup.
Replaced by a newer canonical artifact or rule.
Still queryable but not recommended for new use.

notes: Status subsets remain family-specific even though the vocabulary is globally queryable.
